svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1518px; height: 1px; padding-top: 35px; margin-left: 41px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 16px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: Runbook 構造: 6 ライフサイクル節（Precondition / Detect / Mitigate / Verify / Escalate / Close）と粒度基準

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1518px; height: 1px; padding-top: 64px; margin-left: 41px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #555555;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#555555, #a4a4a4); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: Runbook は「2 名運用で成立する」ための機械的手順書。形式・粒度・順序を固定することで新規執筆の迷いを減らし、夜間単独対応でも判断要素を最小化する。

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 248, 230), rgb(30, 24, 9)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 898px; height: 1px; padding-top: 115px; margin-left: 61px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: Runbook 6 ライフサイクル節（実行順に並ぶ）

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(215, 155, 0), rgb(153, 101, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 846px; height: 1px; padding-top: 155px; margin-left: 94px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: ① Precondition（前提条件）

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 251, 230), rgb(25, 22, 4)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 834px; height: 1px; padding-top: 195px; margin-left: 94px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 実行者の権限（k1s0-operator ロール / OpenBao ポリシー）、必要ツール（kubectl / psql / argocd CLI）、対象環境（prod か staging か）を明記する。前提未達での実行は禁止。対応セクション: md 必須セクション 1（前提条件）。

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(215, 155, 0), rgb(153, 101, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 846px; height: 1px; padding-top: 290px; margin-left: 94px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: ② Detect（対象事象の特定）

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 251, 230), rgb(25, 22, 4)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 834px; height: 1px; padding-top: 330px; margin-left: 94px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 対応する Alertmanager ルール ID / 観測症状 / 分岐条件を具体記述する。Alertmanager の runbook_url ラベルから自動提示される導線を前提とし、対応 FMEA エントリと 1:1 または 1:n 対応を明示。対応セクション: md 必須セクション 2（対象事象）。

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(215, 155, 0), rgb(153, 101, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 846px; height: 1px; padding-top: 425px; margin-left: 94px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: ③ Mitigate（初動 5 分 + 復旧手順 1 時間以内）

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 251, 230), rgb(25, 22, 4)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 834px; height: 1px; padding-top: 465px; margin-left: 94px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 初動は 5 分以内に影響範囲確認・ステークホルダ通知・暫定復旧判断を完了。復旧は「暫定（failover / Pod 再起動）」と「恒久（設定変更 / コード修正デプロイ）」を分離記述。1 ステップ = コマンド 1 回 or 確認 1 項目 = 3 分以内 / 全体 1 時間以内を粒度基準とする。対応セクション: md 必須セクション 3（初動）・5（復旧）。

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(215, 155, 0), rgb(153, 101, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 846px; height: 1px; padding-top: 580px; margin-left: 94px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: ④ Verify（復旧検証）

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 251, 230), rgb(25, 22, 4)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 834px; height: 1px; padding-top: 620px; margin-left: 94px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 復旧後の正常稼働を具体的確認項目で検証する。例: 「p99 レイテンシが 500ms 以内に戻っている（Grafana 参照）」「Loki クエリ {app="k1s0-tier1"} |= "ERROR" でエラーなし」。「問題なし」等の曖昧表現は禁止。対応セクション: md 必須セクション 6（検証手順）。

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(215, 155, 0), rgb(153, 101, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 846px; height: 1px; padding-top: 715px; margin-left: 94px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: ⑤ Escalate（原因特定とエスカレーション）

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 251, 230), rgb(25, 22, 4)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 834px; height: 1px; padding-top: 755px; margin-left: 94px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 根本原因を特定するための調査手順（ログ確認コマンド / メトリクス参照先 / 関連コンポーネント確認順序）を明記。特定不能時のエスカレーション先（L3 コア開発者 / ベンダサポート）を指定する。SEV1 で 3 時間未解決なら RB-DR-001（DR 発動）へエスカレート。対応セクション: md 必須セクション 4（原因特定）。

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(215, 155, 0), rgb(153, 101, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 846px; height: 1px; padding-top: 860px; margin-left: 94px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: ⑥ Close（予防策 + 関連 Runbook + 記録）

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 251, 230), rgb(25, 22, 4)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 834px; height: 1px; padding-top: 900px; margin-left: 94px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 予防策は Jira チケット化しポストモーテムで追跡。関連 Runbook を列挙し連鎖事象（DB → API → 監査）の導線を提供。発動実績は Jira の runbook フィールドで記録、月次集計で発動回数管理。対応セクション: md 必須セクション 7・8。

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 248, 230), rgb(30, 24, 9)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 538px; height: 1px; padding-top: 115px; margin-left: 1001px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 粒度基準（DS-OPS-RB-003）

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(215, 155, 0), rgb(153, 101, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 498px; height: 1px; padding-top: 160px; margin-left: 1021px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 1 Runbook = 1 事象

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 251, 230), rgb(25, 22, 4)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 486px; height: 1px; padding-top: 195px; margin-left: 1034px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 1 Runbook は 1 つのアラート or 1 つの症状に対応。複数原因事象のカバーは禁止。読み手が分岐判断に迷う構成を排除する。

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(215, 155, 0), rgb(153, 101, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 498px; height: 1px; padding-top: 270px; margin-left: 1021px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 1 手順 = 3 分以内

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 251, 230), rgb(25, 22, 4)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 486px; height: 1px; padding-top: 305px; margin-left: 1034px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 1 ステップ = コマンド 1 回 or 確認 1 項目。3 分を超える手順は複数ステップへ分割。対応者が進捗を常に可視化できる状態を保つ。

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(215, 155, 0), rgb(153, 101, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 498px; height: 1px; padding-top: 380px; margin-left: 1021px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 1 Runbook 全体 = 1 時間以内の復旧

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 251, 230), rgb(25, 22, 4)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 486px; height: 1px; padding-top: 415px; margin-left: 1034px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 初動〜検証まで合計 1 時間以内。これを超える場合は Runbook を分割する。RTO 4h の内訳（検知 15 + 初動 15 + 対応 60 + 検証 30 + 報告 30 + バッファ 120）に整合。

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 248, 230), rgb(30, 24, 9)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 538px; height: 1px; padding-top: 555px; margin-left: 1001px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 総数計画（NFR-A-REC-002）

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(215, 155, 0), rgb(153, 101, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 486px; height: 1px; padding-top: 615px; margin-left: 1034px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Phase 1a（MVP-0）: 5 本
FMEA 上位 5 事象をプロトタイプとして整備

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(215, 155, 0), rgb(153, 101, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 486px; height: 1px; padding-top: 690px; margin-left: 1034px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Phase 1b（MVP-1a）: 15 本（本章コミット）
目録は 09_Runbook目録方式.md で確定

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(215, 155, 0), rgb(153, 101, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 486px; height: 1px; padding-top: 765px; margin-left: 1034px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Phase 1c（MVP-1b）: 20 本
運用経験で発見した追加事象を反映

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(215, 155, 0), rgb(153, 101, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 486px; height: 1px; padding-top: 840px; margin-left: 1034px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Phase 2: 30 本（廃止 1 本に対し追加 1.5 本まで）
DR / Temporal / Backstage 等の拡張分を追加

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 498px; height: 1px; padding-top: 910px; margin-left: 1021px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #555555;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#555555, #a4a4a4); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: Phase 1a → 1b → 1c → 2 の階段的整備。無制限拡張を避けるリミットあり。

div.div: 凡例

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(215, 155, 0), rgb(153, 101, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1007px; margin-left: 114px;

display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: アプリ層（Runbook セクション見出し・粒度項目・Phase 本数）

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 251, 230), rgb(25, 22, 4)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1032px; margin-left: 114px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: 詳細パネル（節の内容 / 粒度の根拠）

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 248, 230), rgb(30, 24, 9)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1057px; margin-left: 114px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
